commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And built not:— so far was the Temple from being a great matter!

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: and built not:— so far was the Temple from being a great matter! But Solomon built Him an house.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: David desired to find favor: and he built not, he, the wonderful, the great; but the castaway, Solomon. But Solomon, it says, built Him an house. Howbeit the Most High dwells not in (places) made with hands.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
